title: Gemstone Pack
description: A simple gemstone overlay resource pack for Hypixel Skyblock
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce40f5e905da7dd9f661bd6faef1dab3fd110699.png)
## Overview
This Gemstone resource pack adds a unique twist to your gemstones, giving all glass textures a PS1 style look.

![All gems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/985cd2805bbd39810cc17e660ab8ddf58492a826_0.webp)

## 1.8.9 Requirements
If you're using OptiFine make sure to turn off Connected Textures.

Esc -> Options -> Video settings -> Quality

## 1.21.X+ Disclaimer

Due to modern Minecraft’s rendering, break animations on translucent blocks (such as stained glass) may appear behind/inside the texture. This is a vanilla rendering limitation, not an issue with this resource pack.

Mojang attempted to fix this behavior in snapshot 19w45a, but the issue was later reopened and remains unresolved as of December 2024.

https://bugs-legacy.mojang.com/browse/MC-161926

## Extra
This Gemstone resource pack is just an overlay, making it compatible with most Skyblock resource packs.
